proverb_english: God is the giver of wealth.
meaning_amharic: እውነተኛ ብልጽግና ከፈጣሪ የሚገኝ ስጦታ ነው።
meaning_english: True wealth is a gift from the Creator.

proverb_amharic: ሀምሳ ሎሚ ለሀምሳ ሰው ጌጡ ለአንድ ሰው ሸክሙ
proverb_english: Fifty lemons are an ornament for fifty people, but a burden for one person.
meaning_amharic: የጋራ ችግር በብዙዎች ሲከፋፈል ይቀልላል፤ ለአንድ ሰው ብቻ ሲሆን ግን ይከብዳል። የትብብርን አስፈላጊነት ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: A problem shared among many becomes easy to bear, but it is overwhelming for a single individual. It emphasizes the importance of cooperation and unity.

proverb_english: The wealthy produces; the liar is defeated.
meaning_amharic: ታታሪነት ውጤት ያስገኛል፤ ውሸት ግን መጨረሻው ውድቀት መሆኑን ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Hard work leads to productivity, while dishonesty eventually leads to failure.

proverb_english: Wealth does not stay away from a poor person's house.
meaning_amharic: ድህነት ዘላቂ አይደለም፤ ማንኛውም ሰው በጥረቱ ሀብታም ሊሆን እንደሚችል ተስፋ የሚሰጥ ምሳሌ ነው።
meaning_english: Wealth is attainable for everyone; it suggests that poverty is not a permanent state if one works hard.

proverb_english: When the country is pulled, the trees shake.
meaning_amharic: በሀገር ላይ የሚመጣ ነገር ሁሉንም ዜጋ እንደሚነካ፤ ትልልቅ ችግሮች ትናንሾችንም እንደሚያውኩ ያሳያል።
meaning_english: Events that affect a nation impact every individual; when there is trouble at a high level, everyone feels the vibration.

proverb_english: Gossip does not stay away even from a poor person's house.
meaning_amharic: ሰው ምንም ቢኖረው ወይም ባይኖረው ከሀሜት እንደማያመልጥ፤ ሰዎች ስለማንኛውም ሰው ማውራታቸው እንደማይቀር ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: No one is immune to gossip, regardless of their social or financial status. People will talk about everyone.

proverb_english: If July clears up, it looks like the dry season.
meaning_amharic: አንዳንድ ጊዜ ነገሮች ካሉበት ተጨባጭ ሁኔታ ውጭ ሌላ መስለው ሊታዩ እንደሚችሉ፤ ጊዜያዊ ሁኔታዎች ሊያታልሉ እንደሚችሉ ያሳያል።
meaning_english: Temporary appearances can be deceiving. Even in the middle of the rainy season (July), a clear day can make it look like summer.

proverb_english: A false witness breaks one's strength.
meaning_amharic: ውሸትና የሀሰት ምስክርነት በሰው ሕይወትና ፍትህ ላይ የሚያደርሰውን ከባድ ጉዳት ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: False testimony and lies can destroy a person's standing and ruin lives. It emphasizes the destructive power of dishonesty.

proverb_amharic: ለሆድ ሲሉ ይሞቱ፤ ለክብር ሲሉ ይዋጉ።
proverb_english: They die for greed; they fight for honor.
meaning_amharic: ሰው ለክብሩና ለማንነቱ መቆም እንዳለበት ያስተምራል።
meaning_english: Emphasizes the importance of living with honor rather than greed.

proverb_english: One does not build a house for a past winter.
meaning_amharic: ያለፈ ነገርን ለመለወጥ መሞከር ትርጉም የለውም፤ ጊዜው ካለፈ በኋላ የሚደረግ ጥረት ፋይዳ እንደሌለው ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: It is useless to try to fix or worry about something that has already passed. It emphasizes the importance of focus on the present and future rather than regrets.

proverb_english: What is sent for the sinners overflows to the righteous.
meaning_amharic: መጥፎ ነገር ወይም ቅጣት ለአጥፊዎች ሲመጣ ንጹሃንም አብረው ሊነኩ እንደሚችሉ፤ ወይም ደግሞ ለአንዳንዶች የተረፈው ለሌሎችም እንደሚተርፍ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: When a trial or consequence comes for those who deserve it, the innocent nearby may also be affected. It also suggests that a blessing meant for some can reach everyone.

proverb_english: There is a time for everything.
meaning_amharic: ማንኛውም ነገር በራሱ ጊዜና ወቅት እንደሚከናወን፤ ትዕግስት አስፈላጊ መሆኑን የሚያስተምር ምሳሌ ነው።
meaning_english: Everything happens in its own season; patience is key because things cannot be rushed before their time.

proverb_english: A traveler has no permanent friend.
meaning_amharic: ሁልጊዜ ከአንድ ቦታ ወደ ሌላ ቦታ የሚንቀሳቀስ ወይም የማይረጋጋ ሰው ዘላቂ ወዳጅነት ለመመስረት እንደሚከብደው ያሳያል።
meaning_english: Someone who is always on the move or inconsistent finds it difficult to maintain deep, long-lasting relationships.

proverb_english: There is no comparison for a dream.
meaning_amharic: ህልም ረቂቅና የግል ስለሆነ ከእውነታው ዓለም ጋር በቀጥታ ሊነጻጸር እንደማይችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Dreams are subjective and unique; they cannot be easily compared to or explained by the logic of the waking world.

proverb_english: A master who went out to fight doesn't return just to eat.
meaning_amharic: አንድ ሰው ለትልቅ ዓላማ ወይም ለስራ ከወጣ ያሰበውን ሳይጨርስ ለጥቅም ወይም ለምቾት ብሎ መመለስ እንደሌለበት ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Once someone sets out for a significant mission or duty, they should not return or be distracted by minor comforts until the task is complete.

proverb_english: Temporary water made me poor.
meaning_amharic: ጊዜያዊ ለሆነና ለማያልፍ ነገር ተብሎ ትልቅ ዋጋ መክፈል ወይም ቋሚ ንብረትን ማጣት ስህተት መሆኑን ያሳያል።
meaning_english: It highlights the folly of losing something permanent or valuable for the sake of something fleeting and temporary.

proverb_english: It is not difficult for the one who holds it.
meaning_amharic: አንድን ስራ ወይም ኃላፊነት ለሚወጣው ሰው ከውጭ ለሚያየው እንደሚመስለው ላይከብደው እንደሚችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Things often look much harder from the outside; the person actually doing the work finds a way to manage it.

proverb_english: One who comes to pick a fight will never lack an excuse.
meaning_amharic: ጠብ የሚፈልግ ሰው ጠብ ለመጀመር ሁልጊዜ ምክንያት እንደሚፈልግና እንደማያጣ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Someone looking for conflict will always find a reason or an excuse to justify their behavior.

proverb_english: To the person, more is added.
meaning_amharic: ያለው ሰው ላይ ይጨመርለታል፤ ወይም ደግሞ መልካም የሚያደርግ ሰው የበለጠ በረከት እንደሚያገኝ ያሳያል።
meaning_english: This suggests that abundance attracts abundance, or that those who act rightly receive further blessings.

proverb_english: Do not regret the past, and do not brag about the future.
meaning_amharic: ያለፈው አልፏልና መጸጸት ትርጉም የለውም፤ ስለሚመጣውም ገና ስላልታየ መመካት አይገባም የሚል ትልቅ ምክር ነው።
meaning_english: A piece of advice to not dwell on past mistakes that cannot be changed, and to remain humble about the future which has not yet arrived.

proverb_amharic: ምን ያመጣ ድሀ ምን ያሳሳ ውሃ
proverb_english: What can a poor man bring? What can water thin?
meaning_amharic: አንዳንድ ነገሮች ተፈጥሯዊ ባህሪያቸው የማይለወጥ መሆኑን ወይም አቅም የሌለው ሰው ተጽዕኖ ማሳደር እንደማይችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Certain things have inherent natures that don't change, or it implies that someone without resources cannot bring much to the table.

proverb_english: No matter how much you forget, do not forget the week.
meaning_amharic: በህይወት ውስጥ ብዙ ነገሮች ቢረሱም፤ መሰረታዊ የሆኑ ግዴታዎችንና የጊዜ ዑደቶችን አለመዘንጋት እንደሚገባ ያስገነዝባል።
meaning_english: Even if life is distracting, one should never forget fundamental duties or the basic rhythms of life.

proverb_amharic: ምንም ቢጠም መንገድ ምንም ቢከፋ ዘመድ
proverb_english: No matter how crooked the road, no matter how bad the relative.
meaning_amharic: መንገድ ቢጠማም መድረሻው አይቀርም፤ ዘመድም ቢከፋ መተካቻ ስለሌለው መታገስና መቀበል እንደሚገባ ያሳያል።
meaning_english: Just as a winding road is still the way to your destination, family remains family regardless of their flaws; you must stick with them.

proverb_english: No matter how much they love each other, they are not buried together.
meaning_amharic: ሰው ምንም ያህል ቢዋደድ መጨረሻ ላይ ሁሉም የራሱ የሆነ ኃላፊነትና የራሱ መንገድ እንዳለው ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Despite the depth of love and companionship, everyone ultimately faces their destiny and final journey individually.

proverb_amharic: ምከረው ምከረው እምቢ ሲል መከራ ይምከረው
proverb_english: Advise him, advise him; if he refuses, let trouble advise him.
meaning_amharic: አንድ ሰው በምክር ሊመለስ ካልቻለ፤ በሚገጥመው ችግርና መከራ እንዲማር መተው እንደሚሻል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: If someone refuses to listen to good advice, they will eventually learn the hard way through the consequences of their actions.

proverb_english: One who has nowhere to go creates many exits.
meaning_amharic: ግልጽ አቅጣጫ የሌለው ሰው ብዙ አማራጮችን ለመሞከር እንደሚባክን ወይም መድረሻ ሲጠፋ መውጫ መፈለግ እንደሚበዛ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: A person without a clear destination often wastes energy trying many different paths or looking for escapes when they lack direction.

proverb_english: Let beauty be lost, if supported by a good name.
meaning_amharic: ከመልክ ይልቅ ስምና ዝና (ባህሪ) የበለጠ ዋጋ እንዳለው፤ መልክ ቢጠፋ እንኳን ጥሩ ባህሪ ሰውን እንደሚያስከብር ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Character and reputation are far more valuable than physical beauty; a good name sustains a person even if they lack outward attractiveness.

proverb_english: The 'ugly' one put the beauty to shame.
meaning_amharic: መልከ ጥፉ የሆነች ሴት በትጋቷ ወይም በባህሪዋ ቆንጆ የተባለችውን ልትበልጣት እንደምትችል ያሳያል። ዋናው ቁምነገር መልክ አለመሆኑን ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: Inner virtue or hard work can outshine mere physical beauty, proving that substance is more important than appearance.

proverb_english: A good husband tames a bad wife.
meaning_amharic: የባል ጥሩነትና ትዕግስት መጥፎ ባህሪ ያላትን ሴት ሊለውጣትና ሊያስተካክላት እንደሚችል ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: The positive influence, patience, and kindness of a good husband can improve a wife's difficult character.

proverb_english: A good wife is a crown to her husband.
meaning_amharic: ባህሪዋ ያማረና ታታሪ የሆነች ሚስት ለባሏ ክብርና ኩራት መሆኗን ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: A virtuous and capable wife brings honor, dignity, and pride to her husband's life.

proverb_english: A good name lives beyond the grave.
meaning_amharic: ሰው ከሞተ በኋላ ስራውና ዝናው በምድር ላይ ለረጅም ጊዜ ተከብሮ እንደሚቆይ ይገልጻል።
meaning_english: A person's legacy and reputation survive long after their physical death; doing good ensures you are remembered.
